file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate index.html exists
        run: test -f index.html

      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t gunk-web .

content.text: Now I'll make all the changes.

content.content: (Bash completed with no output)
File created successfully at: /tmp/klaus-sessions/gunk-web/20260406-1917-02dc/flake.nix

input.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@e50d5f73bfe71c2dd0aa4218de8f4afa59f8f81d

      - name: Flake check
        run: nix flake check

      - name: Build
        run: nix build

      - name: Verify output
        run: |
          test -f result/index.html
          test -f result/Caddyfile

      - name: Lint
        run: nix develop -c nixfmt --check .

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate index.html exists
        run: test -f index.html

      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t gunk-web .

input.command: git add flake.nix flake.lock .github/workflows/ci.yml && git rm Dockerfile

content.content: rm 'Dockerfile'

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Replace Dockerfile with Nix flake

Switch from Docker-based build to a Nix flake that exports
packages.default with the static assets (index.html, Caddyfile).
This aligns gunk-web with the flux/infra pattern where the infra
repo consumes the flake and builds the OCI image via
dockerTools.buildLayeredImage.

Update CI to use DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action with
nix flake check, nix build, and nixfmt linting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Replace Dockerfile with Nix flake" --reviewer patflynn --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Delete the Dockerfile — OCI images are built in the infra repo via `dockerTools.buildLayeredImage`
- Add `flake.nix` exporting `packages.default` (copies `index.html` and `Caddyfile` to `$out`), matching the flux repo pattern
- Update CI to use `DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action` with `nix flake check`, `nix build`, and `nixfmt --check` steps
- Pin all action SHAs, add `persist-credentials: false` and `permissions` block

## Test plan
- [x] `nix build` succeeds and `result/` contains `index.html` and `Caddyfile`
- [x] `nix flake check` passes
- [x] `nix develop -c nixfmt --check .` passes
- [ ] CI workflow passes on this PR

Run: 20260406-1917-02dc
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/gunk-dev/gunk-web/pull/2

Summary of changes:
- **Deleted** `Dockerfile`
- **Added** `flake.nix` — exports `packages.default` that copies `index.html` and `Caddyfile` to `$out`, plus a devShell with `nixfmt-rfc-style`
- **Updated** `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — replaced Docker build with Nix steps (flake check, build, verify output, lint), pinned action SHAs, added `persist-credentials: false` and `permissions` block
- **Generated** `flake.lock`

All local checks pass: `nix build`, `nix flake check`, and `nixfmt --check`.

- **Deleted** `Dockerfile`
- **Added** `flake.nix` — exports `packages.default` that copies `index.html` and `Caddyfile` to `$out`, plus a devShell with `nixfmt-rfc-style`
- **Updated** `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — replaced Docker build with Nix steps (flake check, build, verify output, lint), pinned action SHAs, added `persist-credentials: false` and `permissions` block
- **Generated** `flake.lock`

All local checks pass: `nix build`, `nix flake check`, and `nixfmt --check`.
